description: Discovery taxonomy — what the generator prompt asks for / extracts from upstream intents before computing arc-flash.

inputs.description: Voltage / phases / frequency from db-layout-rollup or engineer
true if fault-level intent supplies per-node Ifault
Per-node Ibf + X/R + Z (engineer fallback when intent absent)
true if db-layout-rollup supplies per-board equipment_type + ocpd_type
Optional per-node ac | dc override (default ac unless equipment_type matches dc patterns)
Optional per-node VCB/VCBB/HCB/VOA/HOA override when auto-inference is wrong
Engineer-declared t_clear (s) per node; overrides ocpd-type default
Optional per-node working-distance override (default from Phase A working-distance-defaults.json)
Optional per-node gap-distance override (default from Phase A gap-distance-table.json)
Optional per-node PPE category override (e.g. uprate for safety margin)
Optional per-node method override (skip fallback chain) — for legacy-label reproduction
Optional per-node label-skip declaration with justification (rare, requires explicit reason)
Optional client-specification overrides (e.g. tighter PPE thresholds)
